exampleSentences: Anh ấy luôn tự tin vì mình rất đẹp trai trong mắt mọi người.
Bạn em nói rằng thầy giáo mới ở trường rất đẹp trai và thân thiện.
Em nghĩ diễn viên này đẹp trai nên được nhiều người hâm mộ.
notes_md:
**đẹp trai** = handsome (for males). It describes a man or boy who looks good or attractive.

It’s an adjective, usually placed after the noun: *N + đẹp trai*. You can also use it with **trông** (to look/seem) to comment on appearance.  

It only describes males; for females, use **đẹp** or **xinh**. A near synonym is **bảnh trai** (a bit more stylish/cool vibe). Opposite idea: **xấu trai** (ugly-looking for males).

definitions.en: Attractive or good-looking, typically used to describe a male.
definitions.vi: Hấp dẫn hoặc đẹp, thường được dùng để mô tả một người đàn ông.
definitions.es: Atractivo o de buen ver, típicamente usado para describir a un hombre.

translation.en: He is very handsome and smart.

content.sentence: Anh ấy rất ___ và thông minh.
Cô ấy nghĩ anh ấy rất ___.

translation.en: She thinks he is very handsome.

exampleSentencesTranslated: He is always confident because he is very handsome in everyone's eyes.
My friend said that the new teacher at school is very handsome and friendly.
I think this actor is handsome so he has many fans.
notes:
đẹp trai = handsome (for males). It describes a man or boy who looks good or attractive.

It’s an adjective, usually placed after the noun: N + đẹp trai. You can also use it with trông (to look/seem) to comment on appearance.  

It only describes males; for females, use đẹp or xinh. A near synonym is bảnh trai (a bit more stylish/cool vibe). Opposite idea: xấu trai (ugly-looking for males).
